free_text: R-matrix analysis of reactions with excitation of the
10B compound nucleus at energies of 6.5-19.5 MeV
English translation
Description of experiment is given
English
translation
Description of experiment is given
English
translation
Registration of gamma-quanta and neutrons at
an angle of 0 degr. to the proton beam direction from
the 9Be(p,alpha2)6Li* and 9Be(p,n0)9B reactions,
respectively, and the calibration of accelerator
energy scale by registration of gamma-quanta from the
72Ge(n,n')72Ge* (691 keV), and 72Ge(n,n')72Ge*
(834 keV) reactions were performed simultaneously.
A wave counter was used to register neutrons.
A REGE HPGE detector (diameter 45 mm, height
47.5 mm) registered gamma-quanta at a distance of
150 mm from a beryllium target.
Beryllium target 24 mu-g/cm2 thick (in the 2.7 keV
energy scale for a proton energy of 2.5 MeV) on a
tantalum backing was used.
R-matrix analysis was performed.
Statistical error and the error due to
background subtraction
Entry was approved by Dr. L.N. Generalov
